item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Andrew Cairney From Glasglow, Scotland - Kilting The Competition
item.description: Andrew loaded all nine of the Ardblair Stones and that ninth stone weighs 152kg/335lbs. The Ardblair Stones is a strength feat, where nine reinforced concrete lifting stones of ascending weight are used. The 9 stones weigh 18 kg (40 lb), 32 kg (71 lb), 41 kg (90 lb), 50 kg (110 lb), 75kg (165 lb), 107 kg (236 lb), 118 kg (260 lb), 135 kg (298 lb) and 152 kg (335 lb) respectively. The goal of the competition is to lift each stone sequentially from smallest to largest and place them on top of 4 ft 4 in (52 in) whiskey barrels as quickly as possible. The stones are named for Ardblair Castle located in Blairgowrie, Perthshire in Scotland, close to where they originated. #awesome #scotland #amazing #mildly_interesting

item.title: Enjoy.
item.description:
1 Bill Clinton Apologizes for MK Ultra, Human Experimentation: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jCqhT-T86gc Many of the files were released on December 23, 2024: https://nsarchive.gwu.edu/briefing-book/dnsa-intelligence/2024-12-23/cia-behavior-control-experiments-focus-new-scholarly Information is coming out about a part of MKULTRA called Project Monarch. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a1z87vRvu4E https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YGL02pGoknU
2 https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/factcheck/2020/06/30/fact-check-u-s-government-poisoned-some-alcohol-during-prohibition/3283701001/
3 https://www.thedossier.info/documents/operation-northwoods.pdf
4 https://allthatsinteresting.com/heart-attack-gun
5 https://www.usni.org/magazines/naval-history-magazine/2008/february/truth-about-tonkin
6 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Operation_Snow_White
7 https://allthatsinteresting.com/the-business-plot
8 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/COINTELPRO#Methods
9 https://www.nytimes.com/1977/12/26/archives/worldwide-propaganda-network-built-by-the-cia-a-worldwide-network.html
10 https://www.cdc.gov/tuskegee/about/timeline.html
11 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CIA_involvement_in_Contra_cocaine_trafficking images from https://piximus.net/others/conspiracy-theories-that-turned-out-to-be-true
12 Where Operation Mockingbird and the CIA drug trade met: https://www.nytimes.com/1997/12/19/us/cia-says-it-has-found-no-link-between-itself-and-crack-trade.html
13 Join the CIA today! from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l3gBif0K6cc Humanity is one. Don’t let evil prosper. Seek and speak truth. Spread this to inform others.
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Queen Rosamund and the Gruesome Cup by Fortunino Matania
item.description: Rosamund's people, the Gepid, fought a losing battle against the Lombards for 20 years, ca. 550-570. The Lombards had killed her grandfather (the king) and her uncle. Her father, Cunimund, lost the kingdom in 567, and he was decapitated. She was taken as a prisoner by King Alboin of Lombard, which is the scene depicted here. Alboin's late wife had not produced a male heir and so he married Rosamund for this purpose. He was noted for his cruelty. The title of this story (A Gruesome Cup) derives from a report by Paulus Diaconus, who states that at a royal banquet in Verona, Alboin forced her to drink from the skull of her dead father (which he carried around his belt), inviting her "to drink merrily with her father." WHAT HAPPENED AFTER? Along with her lover, Helmichis, the king's arms bearer, she plotted Alboin's assassination. Helmichis recommended Peredeo, the king's chamber-guard, to carry out the act, but he refused to help. Disguised as a servant, Rosamund bedded Peredeo and blackmailed him into helping. Following a great feast, the drunken king was murdered. Rosamund ran off with Helmichis and a trove of Alboin's private treasures. Soon after they married, however, she took up with another of the assassination conspirators, Longinus, whom she promised to marry in exchange for offing Helmichis. On to this plot against him, however, Helmichis forced Rosamund to drink the poison she had planned for him, after which he committed sucide from the same cup. - Mae Sharifi
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1413 (the vandalism orgy)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Either this or mailed to a republican congressman.
Had an interview for a Recreation attendant position at a time share in Sedona yesterday. I don't know how well it went.
I try to be hilarious. I don't want people to feel the same way I do.
And next week. And the week after that....
Mood.
I can't wait until these two chucklecucks find out after fucking around. Seriously, I can't wait, can someone do something tomorrow?
Oops, should have saved this for a star Trek dump. Might still do so anyway.
....if I had enough money for this and I could find a space in Sedona, I'd unironically do this. Maybe add a bit more decorations on the wall... This is the kind of harmless grift I could probably get behind.
Damn you, Tiiktaalik, you doomed us all.
Anti-fascist Pigeon
One of the meads I'm designing for the winery I do part time sales work for (and doesnt pay nearly enough of the bills, sadly) is going to be a fig and hibiscus based mead inspired by Carthage that I'm tentatively calling "Barca's Revenge." Harvest is coming, though, and as brutal as that would be on my body (long hard hours of bobbing up and down like a goddamn sandpiper at night), I'm tempted to ask to join in for some extra hours. Because fuck my body, I need money apparently.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Pippin. What the hell?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #165
item.description: The sound you hear is the government being broken from the inside out. The Justice Department told agencies to use English only in forms and documents while ICE agents are to deny bond hearings to millions of immigrants. Yet the grift continues as the Pentagon awarded a $200 million contract to Elon Musk's chatbot days after it went on a highly publicized antisemitic rant and called itself Mecha Hitler. You're needed at your local marches and events this Thursday. There is also an opportunity to help the Democratic Party of Georgia reach to voters whose registrations are about to be canceled and help know how to preserve their rights. As always, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/nato-weapons-deal 2. https://go.govbrief.today/nvidia-chips-china 3. https://go.govbrief.today/hobbs-grand-canyon-fire 4. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-nrc-reactors 5. https://go.govbrief.today/nasa-no-climate-reports 6. https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-english-order 7. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-millions-ineligible-bond 8. https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-aspen-security-forum 9. https://go.govbrief.today/kennedy-denies-medicaid-cuts 10. https://go.govbrief.today/appeals-keep-afghan-protections 11. https://go.govbrief.today/judges-reject-interim-attorney 12. https://go.govbrief.today/first-trump-judge-approved 13. https://go.govbrief.today/iranian-student-wife-released 14. https://go.govbrief.today/states-sue-ed-funds 15. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-ed-dept-layoffs 16. https://go.govbrief.today/senators-ssa-reassignments 17. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-leader-didnt-leave 18. https://go.govbrief.today/musk-grok-ai-pentagon 19. https://go.govbrief.today/abbott-musk-letters-foia Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/biden-calls-gop-liars Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/georgia-registration-problems-phonebank Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Goedemorgen
item.description:
Ugh. Slept through the alarm
Now have to rush and get ready
This little one thinks speed means playing
A photo of Frank being Frank courtesy of the tinier. Sometimes a dream is so good that we don't want to break out of it and we have to give our inner self time to process whatever it is we're working out in our subconscious. Not sure what a clown zombie apocalypse means I'm trying to process though...

item.dc:creator: wafflesdidit

item.title: By the looks of these cankles it appears that "it" has congestive heart failure.
item.description: In CHF, the heart ( I didn't think he had one) doesn't pump blood effectively, causing blood and fluid to back up in the veins, leading to fluid accumulation in the lower extremities like ankles and feet. Overall he looks PROFOUNDLY unwell.
item.dc:creator: naturepriestess
